log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Plasmoid — Iron Concentration's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:3+3=6 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:15+-2=13 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:2+-2=0 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 3/3 targets affected.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Frost Giant is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
=== ROUND 2 ===

→ ⚠ Ogre: Charm broken by damage! No longer incapacitated.

Frost Giant is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Plasmoid — Iron Concentration with Greatclub: [d20:20+6=26 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 19 damage. Plasmoid — Iron Concentration HP: 48/67
